steps.title: Welcome to Pulsar
steps.description:
Your setup wizard already created a starter configuration, so this tutorial only focuses on the first useful wins.

You will do three things:
1. Open Switch Mode with `Ctrl+Q`
2. Trigger one generated app slot successfully
3. Open Command Mode with `Ctrl+Shift+Q` and run one command slot

Once you finish those two successful actions, the onboarding path is complete.

steps.title: Switch Mode: app switching and launching
steps.description:
`Ctrl+Q` opens Switch Mode. The outer ring shows the starter app slots generated during setup.

Use it when you want to jump to an app quickly:
• If the app is already open, Pulsar switches to it
• If it is not open yet, Pulsar launches it

Press `Ctrl+Q` once now to see those generated slots.
steps.waitHintText: Open Switch Mode with Ctrl+Q. If the hotkey is busy or not responding yet, you can still continue manually.

steps.title: Complete one successful Switch Mode action
steps.description:
Now trigger one of the generated app slots from Switch Mode.

Success means Pulsar either switches to the running app or launches it for you. As soon as one switch action succeeds, this step will advance automatically.
steps.waitHintText: Choose any generated app slot from Switch Mode. This step only completes after Pulsar reports a successful switch or launch action.

steps.title: Command Mode: run an action
steps.description:
`Ctrl+Shift+Q` opens Command Mode. This mode runs actions instead of switching apps.

Your onboarding setup created at least one starter command slot already, so you do not need to configure anything else first. Open Command Mode once now to preview it.
steps.waitHintText: Open Command Mode with Ctrl+Shift+Q. If needed, you can continue manually and try the action on the next step.

steps.title: Complete one successful Command Mode action
steps.description:
Now run one generated command slot from Command Mode.

As soon as Pulsar completes one command successfully, the tutorial records the milestone and finishes the guided onboarding path.
steps.waitHintText: Choose any generated command slot. This step advances only after Pulsar reports a successful command execution.

steps.title: Onboarding complete
steps.description:
You have completed Pulsar's minimum onboarding loop.

Done:
• You opened Switch Mode with `Ctrl+Q`
• You completed one successful switch or launch action
• You opened Command Mode with `Ctrl+Shift+Q`
• You completed one successful command action

From here, you can keep using the generated defaults as-is, or open Settings later to refine labels, icons, and arguments.
